positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for diamond_mine_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    diamond_mine != imperium).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    roderick_strong != imperium).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    roderick_strong != creed_brothers).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    diamond_mine != creed_brothers).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    roderick_strong != ivy_nile).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ivy_nile != imperium).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~leads(roderick_strong,creed_brothers)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    diamond_mine != roderick_strong).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    creed_brothers != ivy_nile).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    creed_brothers != imperium).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    diamond_mine != ivy_nile).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define formed_in_wwe(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define includes(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feud(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
